    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default @NotNull List<CosmeticLocation<? extends Cosmetic>>
    CosmeticRegistry.getAllCosmetics()
    Fetches a list of all registered CosmeticLocations.

    @NotNull List<CosmeticLocation<? extends T>>
    CosmeticRegistry.getAllFor(@Nullable Class<T> parentClass)
    Fetches a list of Locations for a specific Cosmetic.
